jobs.title: Tirocinante pianificazione finanziaria (entrata laterale) tempo indeterminato
jobs.description:
Tirocinante pianificazione finanziaria (entrata laterale) tempo indeterminato

Entrata laterale nella consulenza Finanza & Previdenza – senza vendita di prodotti assicurativi. Focus su 3a/3b, piani d'investimento/ETF, fondi previdenziali e budgeting.

Punti chiave:

- Organizzazione: Convit International GmbH

- Sede: Massagno, Svizzera (TI) · Homeoffice/ibrido possibile

- Contratto: Tempo indeterminato · Grado: 10–100 % · Lingua: IT (B2+)

- Salario: CHF 1500–7500/mese OTE (fisso + bonus; in base a grado & performance)

- Contatto: Recruiting@convit.ch

Formazione VBV gratuita:

- Formazione VBV inclusa e gratuita; dopo il percorso ottieni la certificazione VBV.

- Adatto anche a cambi di carriera/entrata laterale (senza esperienza).

Responsabilità:

- Consulenza a clienti privati/PMI su previdenza, risparmio & soluzioni 3a/3b (senza assicurazioni).

- Analisi bisogni, creazione concetti finanziari e follow‑up in CRM.

- Appuntamenti online e in presenza; gestione pipeline e raccomandazioni.

Profilo:

- Orientamento al cliente, comunicazione chiara, attitudine commerciale e voglia di imparare.

- Preferibile esperienza in vendita/servizio; non obbligatoria.

Offriamo:

- Formazione interna retribuita, mentoring continuo, strumenti moderni e forte backoffice.

- Flessibilità oraria, Homeoffice/ibrido, percorso di carriera chiaro (Junior → Senior → Teamlead).

- Incentivi: viaggio annuale 5‑stelle per Top Performer.

Requisito Grenzgänger (frontalieri):

- Obbligatorio permesso G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) per candidati frontalieri che risiedono in Italia.

- Non consideriamo candidature senza status di Grenzgänger (permesso G).

Candidatura: Invia la domanda online – risposta rapida.

Nota: Nessuna vendita di prodotti assicurativi.

descriptionByLocale.en: Tirocinante financial planning (side entrance) indefinite time Lateral revenue in the consulting Finance & Security – without sale of insurance products. Focus on 3a/3b, investment plans/ ETFs, social security funds and budgeting. Key points: - Organization: Convit International GmbH - Location: Massagno, Switzerland (TI) · Homeoffice/hybrid possible - Contract: Undetermined time · Grade: 10–100 % · Language: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/month OTE (fix + bonus; based on degree & performance) - Contact: Recruiting@convit.ch Free VBV Formation: - VBV Formation included and free of charge; after the route you get the VBV certification. - Also suitable for career/side entrance changes (without experience). Responsibility: - Advice to private customers/ SMEs on social security, savings & 3a/3b solutions (without insurance). - Analysis needs, creation of financial concepts and follow-up in CRM. - Online appointments and in presence; pipeline management and recommendations. Profile: - Customer orientation, clear communication, commercial attitude and desire to learn. - Preferable experience for sale/service; not obligatory. We offer: - Remunerated internal training, continuous mentoring, modern tools and strong backoffice. - Oral flexibility, Homeoffice/hybrid, clear career path (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentives: 5‐star annual trip for Top Performer. Requisite Grenzgänger (frontier): - Mandatory permit G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) for frontier candidates residing in Italy. - We do not consider applications without status of Grenzgänger (allowed G). Application: Send the question online – quick answer. Note: No sale of insurance products.

descriptionByLocale.en: Financial planning (junior) – mentoring Lateral revenue in Finance & Security consulting – without selling insurance products. Focus on 3a/3b, investment plans/ ETFs, social security funds and budgeting. Key points: - Organization: Convit International GmbH - Venue: Gordola, Switzerland (TI) · Homeoffice/hybrid possible - Contract: Undetermined time · Grade: 10–100 % · Language: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/month OTE (fix + bonus; based on degree & performance) - Contact: Recruiting@convit.ch Free VBV Formation: - VBV Formation included and free of charge; after the route you get the VBV certification. - Also suitable for career/side entrance changes (without experience). Responsibility: - Advice to private customers/ SMEs on social security, savings and 3a/3b solutions (without insurance). - Analysis of needs, creation of financial concepts and follow-up in CRM. - Online appointments and in presence; pipeline management and recommendations. Profile: - Customer orientation, clear communication, commercial attitude and desire to learn. - Preferable experience for sale/services; not obligatory. We offer: - Remunerated internal training, continuous mentoring, modern tools and strong backoffice. - Oral flexibility, Homeoffice/hybrid, clear career path (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentives: 5‐star annual trip for Top Performer. Requisite Grenzgänger (frontier): - Mandatory permit G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) for frontier candidates residing in Italy. - We do not consider applications without status of Grenzgänger (allowed G). Application: Send the question online – quick answer. Note: No sale of insurance products.
descriptionByLocale.de: Finanzplanung (Junior) – Mentoring Lateral Einnahmen in Finanz- und Sicherheitsberatung – ohne Verkauf von Versicherungsprodukten. Konzentrieren Sie sich auf 3a/3b, Investitionspläne/ ETFs, Sozialversicherungsfonds und Budgetierung. Schlagworte: - Organisation: Convit International GmbH - Veranstaltungsort: Gordola, Schweiz (TI) · Homeoffice/hybrid möglich - Vertrag: Unbestimmte Zeit · Grad: 10–100 % · Sprache: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/monat OTE (Fix + Bonus; basierend auf Abschluss & Performance) - Kontakt: Recruiting@convit.ch Free VBV Formation: Formation inbegriffen und kostenlos; nach der Route erhalten Sie die VBV-Zertifizierung. - Auch geeignet für Karriere/Seiteneintrittsänderungen (ohne Erfahrung). Verantwortung: - Beratung bei Privatkunden/ KMU über soziale Sicherheit, Einsparungen und 3a/3b Lösungen (ohne Versicherung). - Analyse der Bedürfnisse, Erstellung von Finanzkonzepten und Follow-up in CRM. - Online Termine und in Anwesenheit; Pipeline-Management und Empfehlungen. Profil: - Kundenorientierung, klare Kommunikation, kommerzielle Einstellung und Wunsch zu lernen. - Vorzugserfahrung zum Verkauf/Dienstleistungen; nicht obligatorisch. Wir bieten: - Vergütung für internes Training, kontinuierliches Mentoring, moderne Werkzeuge und starkes Backoffice. - Orale Flexibilität, Homeoffice/hybrid, klarer Karriereweg (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentives: 5-Sterne-Jahresreise für Top Performer. Erforderliche Grenzgänger (Front): - Mandatäre Genehmigung G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) für Grenzanwärter mit Wohnsitz in Italien. - Wir betrachten keine Anträge ohne Status von Grenzgänger (erlaubt G). Anwendung: Senden Sie die Frage online – schnelle Antwort. Hinweis: Kein Verkauf von Versicherungsprodukten.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Planification financière (junior) – mentorat Revenus latéraux en consultation Finance & Sécurité – sans vendre de produits d'assurance. Points clés: - Organisation: Convit International GmbH - Lieu: Gordola, Suisse (TI) · Homeoffice/hybride possible - Contrat: Temps indéterminé · Grade: 10–100 % · Langue: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/mois OTE (fix + bonus; basé sur le degré et la performance) - Contact: Recruiting@convit.ch Formation gratuite VBV: - VBV Formation incluse et gratuite; après l'itinéraire vous obtenez la certification VBV. - Convient également aux changements de carrière/d'entrée latérale (sans expérience). Responsabilité: - Conseils aux clients privés/ PME sur la sécurité sociale, l'épargne et les solutions 3a/3b (sans assurance). - Analyse des besoins, création de concepts financiers et suivi du CRM. - Nominations en ligne et en présence; gestion des pipelines et recommandations. jobs.title: Consulente previdenziale & risparmio (junior)
jobs.description:
Consulente previdenziale & risparmio (junior)

Entrata laterale nella consulenza Finanza & Previdenza – senza vendita di prodotti assicurativi. Focus su 3a/3b, piani d'investimento/ETF, fondi previdenziali e budgeting.

Punti chiave:

- Organizzazione: Convit International GmbH

- Sede: Lugano, Svizzera (TI) · Homeoffice/ibrido possibile

- Contratto: Tempo indeterminato · Grado: 10–100 % · Lingua: IT (B2+)

- Salario: CHF 1500–7500/mese OTE (fisso + bonus; in base a grado & performance)

- Contatto: Recruiting@convit.ch

Formazione VBV gratuita:

- Formazione VBV inclusa e gratuita; dopo il percorso ottieni la certificazione VBV.

- Adatto anche a cambi di carriera/entrata laterale (senza esperienza).

Responsabilità:

- Consulenza a clienti privati/PMI su previdenza, risparmio & soluzioni 3a/3b (senza assicurazioni).

- Analisi bisogni, creazione concetti finanziari e follow‑up in CRM.

- Appuntamenti online e in presenza; gestione pipeline e raccomandazioni.

Profilo:

- Orientamento al cliente, comunicazione chiara, attitudine commerciale e voglia di imparare.

- Preferibile esperienza in vendita/servizio; non obbligatoria.

Offriamo:

- Formazione interna retribuita, mentoring continuo, strumenti moderni e forte backoffice.

- Flessibilità oraria, Homeoffice/ibrido, percorso di carriera chiaro (Junior → Senior → Teamlead).

- Incentivi: viaggio annuale 5‑stelle per Top Performer.

Requisito Grenzgänger (frontalieri):

- Obbligatorio permesso G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) per candidati frontalieri che risiedono in Italia.

- Non consideriamo candidature senza status di Grenzgänger (permesso G).

Candidatura: Invia la domanda online – risposta rapida.

Nota: Nessuna vendita di prodotti assicurativi.

jobs.title: Consulente previdenziale (Ibrido) ingresso senza esperienza
jobs.description:
Consulente previdenziale (Ibrido) ingresso senza esperienza

Entrata laterale nella consulenza Finanza & Previdenza – senza vendita di prodotti assicurativi. Focus su 3a/3b, piani d'investimento/ETF, fondi previdenziali e budgeting.

Punti chiave:

- Organizzazione: Convit International GmbH

- Sede: Paradiso, Svizzera (TI) · Homeoffice/ibrido possibile

- Contratto: Tempo indeterminato · Grado: 10–100 % · Lingua: IT (B2+)

- Salario: CHF 1500–7500/mese OTE (fisso + bonus; in base a grado & performance)

- Contatto: Recruiting@convit.ch

Formazione VBV gratuita:

- Formazione VBV inclusa e gratuita; dopo il percorso ottieni la certificazione VBV.

- Adatto anche a cambi di carriera/entrata laterale (senza esperienza).

Responsabilità:

- Consulenza a clienti privati/PMI su previdenza, risparmio & soluzioni 3a/3b (senza assicurazioni).

- Analisi bisogni, creazione concetti finanziari e follow‑up in CRM.

- Appuntamenti online e in presenza; gestione pipeline e raccomandazioni.

Profilo:

- Orientamento al cliente, comunicazione chiara, attitudine commerciale e voglia di imparare.

- Preferibile esperienza in vendita/servizio; non obbligatoria.

Offriamo:

- Formazione interna retribuita, mentoring continuo, strumenti moderni e forte backoffice.

- Flessibilità oraria, Homeoffice/ibrido, percorso di carriera chiaro (Junior → Senior → Teamlead).

- Incentivi: viaggio annuale 5‑stelle per Top Performer.

Requisito Grenzgänger (frontalieri):

- Obbligatorio permesso G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) per candidati frontalieri che risiedono in Italia.

- Non consideriamo candidature senza status di Grenzgänger (permesso G).

Candidatura: Invia la domanda online – risposta rapida.

Nota: Nessuna vendita di prodotti assicurativi.

descriptionByLocale.en: Preliminary advisor (Hybrid) entry without experience Lateral entry into Finance & Security consultancy – without sale of insurance products. Focus on 3a/3b, investment plans/ ETFs, social security funds and budgeting. Key points: - Organization: Convit International GmbH - Location: Paradiso, Svizzera (TI) · Homeoffice/hybrid possible - Contract: Undetermined time · Grade: 10–100 % · Language: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/month OTE (fix + bonus; based on degree & performance) - Contact: Recruiting@convit.ch Free VBV Formation: - VBV Formation included and free of charge; after the route you get the VBV certification. - Also suitable for career/side entrance changes (without experience). Responsibility: - Advice to private customers/ SMEs on social security, savings & 3a/3b solutions (without insurance). - Analysis needs, creation of financial concepts and follow-up in CRM. - Online appointments and in presence; pipeline management and recommendations. Profile: - Customer orientation, clear communication, commercial attitude and desire to learn. - Preferable experience for sale/service; not obligatory. We offer: - Remunerated internal training, continuous mentoring, modern tools and strong backoffice. - Oral flexibility, Homeoffice/hybrid, clear career path (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentives: 5‐star annual trip for Top Performer. Requisite Grenzgänger (frontier): - Mandatory permit G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) for frontier candidates residing in Italy. - We do not consider applications without status of Grenzgänger (allowed G). Application: Send the question online – quick answer. Note: No sale of insurance products.
descriptionByLocale.de: Vorsorgeberater (Hybrid) Eintritt ohne Erfahrung Seitlicher Eintritt in Finanz- und Sicherheitsberatung – ohne Verkauf von Versicherungsprodukten. Konzentrieren Sie sich auf 3a/3b, Investitionspläne/ ETFs, Sozialversicherungsfonds und Budgetierung. - Organisation: Convit International GmbH - Standort: Paradiso, Svizzera (TI) · Homeoffice/hybrid möglich - Vertrag: Unbestimmte Zeit · Grad: 10–100 % · Sprache: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/Monat OTE (Fix + Bonus; basierend auf Abschluss & Performance) - Kontakt: Recruiting@convitation - VBV Formation Formation inklusive und kostenlos; nach der Route erhalten Sie die VBV-Zertifizierung. - Auch geeignet für Karriere/Seiteneintrittsänderungen (ohne Erfahrung). Verantwortung: - Beratung bei Privatkunden/ KMU über soziale Sicherheit, Einsparungen & 3a/3b Lösungen (ohne Versicherung). - Analysebedarf, Erstellung von Finanzkonzepten und Follow-up in CRM. - Online Termine und in Anwesenheit; Pipeline-Management und Empfehlungen. Profil: - Kundenorientierung, klare Kommunikation, kommerzielle Einstellung und Wunsch zu lernen. - Vorzugserfahrung zum Verkauf/Dienstleistungen; nicht obligatorisch. Wir bieten: - Vergütung für internes Training, kontinuierliche Mentoring, moderne Werkzeuge und starkes Backoffice. - Orale Flexibilität, Homeoffice/hybrid, klarer Karriereweg (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentives: 5-Sterne-Jahresreise für Top Performer. Erforderliche Grenzgänger (Front): - Mandatäre Genehmigung G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) für Grenzanwärter mit Wohnsitz in Italien. - Wir betrachten keine Anträge ohne Status von Grenzgänger (allowed G). Anwendung: Senden Sie die Frage online – schnelle Antwort. Anmerkung: Kein Verkauf von Versicherungsprodukten.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Advisor préliminaire (Hybrid) entrée sans expérience Entrée latérale dans le conseil Finance & Sécurité – sans vente de produits d'assurance. Se concentrer sur 3a/3b, plans d'investissement/ETF, fonds de sécurité sociale et budgétisation. Points clés: - Organisation: Convit International GmbH - Lieu: Paradiso, Svizzera (TI) · Homeoffice/hybride possible - Contrat: Temps indéterminé · Grade: 10–100 % · Langue: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/mois OTE (fix + bonus; basé sur le degré et la performance) - Contact: Recruiting@convit.ch Formation gratuite VBV: - VBV Formation incluse et gratuite; après l'itinéraire, vous obtenez la certification VBV. - Convient également pour les changements de carrière / d'entrée côté (sans expérience). Responsabilité: - Conseils aux clients privés/ PME sur la sécurité sociale, l'épargne et les solutions 3a/3b (sans assurance). - Les besoins en analyse, la création de concepts financiers et le suivi dans le CRM. - Nominations en ligne et en présence; gestion des pipelines et recommandations. Profil : - Orientation client, communication claire, attitude commerciale et désir d'apprendre. - Expérience préférentielle en vente/service; non obligatoire. Nous offrons: - Formation interne rémunérée, mentorat continu, outils modernes et backoffice solide. - Flexibilité orale, Homeoffice/hybride, parcours de carrière clair (Junior → Senior → Teamleader). - Incentives : voyage annuel de 5 étoiles pour Top Performer. Requis Grenzgänger (frontière): - Permis obligatoire G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) pour les candidats frontaliers résidant en Italie. - Nous n'étudions pas les demandes sans statut de Grenzgänger (autorisation G). Application: Envoyez la question en ligne – réponse rapide. Note: Pas de vente de produits d'assurance.
